studyName: VESPA: Genome Wide Study of Ace Inhibitor Cough

tables.description: The dataset provides information about the medical history of participants, including diagnoses of respiratory system illnesses, emphysema, and GERD, in addition to information of smoking status (ever/never) and gender/age category.

variables.name: Allergic_alveolitis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has post-nasal drip ICD9s (495.X) ever

variables.name: Asthma
variables.description: Asthma History Ind-2 a 'yes' or 'no' indicator to ask whether there is a history of asthma ICD9s (see list) ever

variables.name: Bronchiectasis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has asthma ICD9s (494.X) ever

variables.name: Bronchitis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has Bronchitis ICD9s (490) ever

variables.name: COPD
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has COPD ICD9s (496) ever

variables.name: Chronic_Bronchitis
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has Chronic Bronchitis ICD9s (491.X) ever

variables.name: Decade_Birth
variables.description: Decade of Birth

variables.name: Emphysema
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has Emphysema ICD9s (492.X) ever

variables.name: GERD
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has GERD ICD9s (530.11, 530.81) ever

variables.name: Post_Nasal_Drip
variables.description: Flag indicating subject has post-nasal drip ICD9s (461.X, 473.X) ever

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

variables.name: Smoking_Status
variables.description: Flag indicating smoking status - just ever (=4)  or never (=1)

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.description: Sample Use
